---
title: "Tutorial"
---

## Installation

Clone the repository and install the package locally.

~~~bash
pip install -e .
~~~

## Run the data pipeline

~~~bash
python scripts/run_pipeline.py
~~~

## Example usage

~~~python
from earthquake_analysis import (
    fetch_ncei,
    fetch_usgs,
    merge_usgs_ncei,
    clean_merged,
    magnitude_vs_impact,
)

df_ncei = fetch_ncei(min_year=2010, max_year=2024)
df_usgs = fetch_usgs("2010-01-01", "2024-12-31")

merged = merge_usgs_ncei(df_usgs, df_ncei)
cleaned = clean_merged(merged)

result = magnitude_vs_impact(cleaned)
print(result.head())
~~~

## Launch the dashboard

~~~bash
streamlit run app.py
~~~

## Notes

The project combines earthquake event data with impact-related data, then summarizes patterns by magnitude, depth, region, and year.
